commandPalette.title: Command Palette

descriptions.assetOpeningBalance: Posted as an opening balance journal entry against Opening Equity. Opening balance date is used only when initial balance is non-zero.
descriptions.liabilityOpeningBalance: Posted as opening debt against Opening Equity. Liability opening amounts must be positive.
descriptions.main: Add a new account to your ledger.
